summary: Enthusiastic five‑star rating praises the Dead’s forward‑thinking performance despite an apparently empty audience; recording details are not mentioned.
review: The lone reviewer gave this recording a perfect five stars, noting that the concert seemed to have no audience but still highlighted the band’s visionary playing. No specific comments about sound quality, song selection, or individual members were provided, so the assessment of the recording itself remains undefined.
